positive: Minimalist symmetrical design featuring a vibrant, stylized ouroboros coiled around a crescent moon and scattered geometric constellations. The overall style is bold, retro-futuristic, and highly graphic, resembling Art Deco celestial mapping mixed with modern vector illustration. Use a palette of deep indigo, radiant gold, and crisp cream white. Emphasize clean lines, strong negative space, and perfect symmetry for central placement on clothing. The composition must be a perfect circle ready for print, with sharp edges and high contrast.
negative: blurry, noisy, text, logo, watermark, grainy, dirty, low detail, artifacts, extra limbs, bad anatomy, signature, signature, copyright, sketch, photorealistic
